## What & why

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (the full suite is green)
- [ ] Added/updated a test in `compiler/tests/run.js` (and an example if relevant)
- [ ] `.px` sources formatted with `pcx fmt`
- [ ] Stayed dependency-free; playground-imported modules use no Node-only globals
- [ ] Updated docs (`docs/`, README) if behavior or the CLI changed
